style.description: Original fierce Chinese flying dragon with a compact S-shaped silhouette
style.perspective: front three-quarter head with serpentine body in flight
style.lighting: dramatic soft upper-left light with strong value separation
style.detailLevel: medium-high on the head, simplified along the body
style.accentPolicy: crimson horns are the only strong accent; golden eyes support facial readability

tokens.label: Fierce Chinese flying dragon
tokens.subject: One airborne Chinese dragon with a compact S-shaped body

assumptions: The artwork is an original direction without proprietary vendor references.
The built-in image generation model identifier is not exposed to this workflow.
Final ownership and redistribution status require project-owner confirmation.
